calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Approval Of Claim Against Estate By Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Barger for David Freed (Petitioner/Claimant).

The Court stated that there are no documents to support the claim, that it was an oral contract and that there is no proof of a contract. Mr. Barger stated that the four cousins knew the situation, that Mr. Freed was the only one who had money to pay for the Decedent's Mother's care and that it was a family arrangement/transaction. The Petition for Approval of Claim, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Approval Of Claim Against Estate By Personal Representative
